name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit Slim Small Denim Shoulder Bag. This Gucci Horsebit Slim shoulder bag is crafted from the new GG black denim fabric from the 2024 Pre-Fall collection, featuring silver-tone hardware on the strap to create a metallic texture and highlight a contrasting aesthetic. Black leather trim and tonal key charm add fullness to the design. Black and grey GG denim, black leather trim, as a selected item for the Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, slender silhouette with horsebit detail, leather key charm, shoulder strap (20cm high). Zipper closure.
